positive: A stylish, minimalist vector illustration of an adventurous wilderness scene. The composition should feature interlocking geometric shapes forming stylized representations of mountains, pine trees, and abstract celestial bodies (moon, stars). Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of forest green, burnt orange, and cream. The style must be clean line art, bold silhouette design, perfect for screen printing on apparel. The composition should be perfectly centered and symmetrical, designed for maximum visibility on a chest area. Flat graphic design, vector art, clean edges, strong linework, high contrast, perfect symmetry.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermarks, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grain, noisy, low detail, photorealistic, 3d render
